notes: Every record executes an explicit index/history/stop/output/work statevector permutation.
The durable output is copied before strict replay uncomputation of all transient registers.
Schedule access is charged as an unoptimised linear compiled SELECT; QRAM is never assumed.
Schedules are public fixtures, so this artifact does not establish coherent boundary discovery or a quantum advantage theorem.
